description: A recent database update accidentally wiped the email addresses for all customers associated with Store #2. Restore the missing emails in the 'sakila.customer' table using the backup CSV file located at '/home/ga/Documents/cust_backup_store2.csv'. Use the local MySQL instance (user: ga, password: password123). Export the recovered Store #2 customers, including their customer_id, first_name, last_name, and email, to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/recovered_emails.csv'.
